creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: I have a shared directory on a NAS with a space in it, which causes automount to not recognize the directory.  It ends up mounting on the name "/net/.../FirstWord", which doesn't exist on the NAS.  It looks to be a simple quoting issue in /etc/autofs/special_hosts, though adding '\"' around the two '%s' formatters for $1 in the awk script caused I/O errors, and I haven't debugged any further.
